name: Chicken Cooked with Rice
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Boneless chicken thighs, skin removed
2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice in a clay pot or medium-sized pot with water to cover about 1-inch. Bring rice to boil; cook until most water evaporates. Reduce heat to low and cover tightly.
2. Coarsely chop chicken. Combine with soy sauces, wine, salt, sesame oil, and cornstarch.
3. Heat wok or large saute pan until hot. Add oil and ginger; stir-fry for 10 seconds.
4. Add chicken, and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Pour the contents of the wok over the rice, cover, and continue to cook for 10 minutes.
6. Just before serving, drizzle soy sauce on top of the rice and garnish with scallions.
